## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential partnership between GrowthX and Pieces for programmatic SEO and content strategy optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/cGmj-TE5Vd3L6ptLg9J5A2brrNtR7L1m?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Pieces is seeking to revamp their SEO strategy, focusing on quality over quantity after previous low-quality content efforts](https://fathom.video/share/cGmj-TE5Vd3L6ptLg9J5A2brrNtR7L1m?tab=summary&timestamp=490.0)
  - [GrowthX offers a 12-week process to develop a content strategy, combining editorial and programmatic SEO approaches](https://fathom.video/share/cGmj-TE5Vd3L6ptLg9J5A2brrNtR7L1m?tab=summary&timestamp=702.0)
  - [GrowthX typically sees initial traffic spikes around month 3, with compounding growth thereafter](https://fathom.video/share/cGmj-TE5Vd3L6ptLg9J5A2brrNtR7L1m?tab=summary&timestamp=1582.0)
  - [Next step: Schedule follow-up call with Pieces' SEO lead to discuss further details and potential collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/cGmj-TE5Vd3L6ptLg9J5A2brrNtR7L1m?tab=summary&timestamp=1986.0)

## Topics

### Pieces' Current SEO Situation

  - [Revamping content strategy after previous low-quality efforts](https://fathom.video/share/cGmj-TE5Vd3L6ptLg9J5A2brrNtR7L1m?tab=summary&timestamp=490.0)
  - [Shifted to in-house content creation by engineers and dev advocates](https://fathom.video/share/cGmj-TE5Vd3L6ptLg9J5A2brrNtR7L1m?tab=summary&timestamp=437.0)
  - [Experienced a traffic decrease but improved engagement](https://fathom.video/share/cGmj-TE5Vd3L6ptLg9J5A2brrNtR7L1m?tab=summary&timestamp=445.0)
  - [Organic search remains the primary growth driver](https://fathom.video/share/cGmj-TE5Vd3L6ptLg9J5A2brrNtR7L1m?tab=summary&timestamp=496.0)
  - [Seeking to scale quality content production efficiently](https://fathom.video/share/cGmj-TE5Vd3L6ptLg9J5A2brrNtR7L1m?tab=summary&timestamp=461.0)

### GrowthX's Approach to Content Strategy

  - [12-week process for developing content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/cGmj-TE5Vd3L6ptLg9J5A2brrNtR7L1m?tab=summary&timestamp=1072.0)
  - [Combines editorial and programmatic SEO approaches](https://fathom.video/share/cGmj-TE5Vd3L6ptLg9J5A2brrNtR7L1m?tab=summary&timestamp=965.0)
  - [Creates a "Content OS" with topical opportunities and keyword clusters](https://fathom.video/share/cGmj-TE5Vd3L6ptLg9J5A2brrNtR7L1m?tab=summary&timestamp=1227.0)
  - [Uses AI-assisted workflows with human oversight for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/cGmj-TE5Vd3L6ptLg9J5A2brrNtR7L1m?tab=summary&timestamp=1334.0)
  - [Focuses on understanding client's product, personas, and industry deeply](https://fathom.video/share/cGmj-TE5Vd3L6ptLg9J5A2brrNtR7L1m?tab=summary&timestamp=993.0)

### SEO Performance Expectations

  - [Typical results timeline: initial spike around month 3, compounding growth thereafter](https://fathom.video/share/cGmj-TE5Vd3L6ptLg9J5A2brrNtR7L1m?tab=summary&timestamp=1582.0)
  - [Example: Customer with no blog reached 100+ daily clicks within 3 months](https://fathom.video/share/cGmj-TE5Vd3L6ptLg9J5A2brrNtR7L1m?tab=summary&timestamp=1546.0)
  - [Case study: Zooplo (API management) saw growth from 200 to 350+ daily clicks in a few months](https://fathom.video/share/cGmj-TE5Vd3L6ptLg9J5A2brrNtR7L1m?tab=summary&timestamp=1632.0)

### AI-Generated Content and SEO

  - [GrowthX believes Google focuses on user experience and content quality, not detection of AI-generated content](https://fathom.video/share/cGmj-TE5Vd3L6ptLg9J5A2brrNtR7L1m?tab=summary&timestamp=1767.0)
  - [Recent algorithm changes target broad, unfocused content strategies](https://fathom.video/share/cGmj-TE5Vd3L6ptLg9J5A2brrNtR7L1m?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
  - [Emphasis on creating authoritative, relevant content for specific personas](https://fathom.video/share/cGmj-TE5Vd3L6ptLg9J5A2brrNtR7L1m?tab=summary&timestamp=1920.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule a follow-up call with Pieces' SEO lead for Wednesday at 11 AM Eastern](https://fathom.video/share/cGmj-TE5Vd3L6ptLg9J5A2brrNtR7L1m?tab=summary&timestamp=2031.0)
  - [GrowthX to send additional materials for review before the call](https://fathom.video/share/cGmj-TE5Vd3L6ptLg9J5A2brrNtR7L1m?tab=summary&timestamp=1986.0)
  - [Explore potential collaboration and address any remaining questions from Pieces' team](https://fathom.video/share/cGmj-TE5Vd3L6ptLg9J5A2brrNtR7L1m?tab=summary&timestamp=1986.0)
